title: Fix event details display in booking requests

requirements.text: Display complete event details (event type, date, location, number of guests, style, contact number) in the OrganizerBookingCard component for each booking request

quotes: I can't still view details of the events in booking requests

acceptanceCriteria: Event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number are visible in each booking card
Event details are properly formatted and displayed with appropriate icons matching the EventList component pattern
All event information from the associated booking request is accessible to organizers

requirements.text: Display complete event details (event type, date, location, number of guests, style, contact number) in the GuestBookingList component for each booking

quotes: I can't still view details of the events in booking requests

acceptanceCriteria: Event details are visible in guest booking cards alongside organizer name and booking status
Event information includes all fields: type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number
Layout accommodates the additional event details without breaking responsive design

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or data structures
Maintain existing booking status color coding and UI patterns
Preserve the current booking approval/rejection workflow for organizers
nonGoals: Adding new event fields or modifying event data structure
Changing the booking request submission process
Modifying the authentication or authorization system
